holdings.n: Digital Core REIT Management Pte Ltd

holdings.infoBox: REAI is an equity ETF with a total of 25 individual holdings. The top holdings are Equinix stock at 10.03%, Digital Realty Trust at 9.43%, Digital Core REIT Management Pte at 7.51%, Iron Mountain at 5.70%, and American Tower at 4.76%.

overview.description: The Intelligent Real Estate ETF (REAI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests primarily in US-listed commercial REITs that provide qualitative characteristics of a portfolio of public, non-traded REITs. The fund also invests, to a lesser extent, in mortgage-backed securities. REAI was launched on Jun 13, 2023 and is issued by Armada ETF Advisors.

holdings.n: Digital Core REIT Management Pte Ltd
